answer:
The function is defined when \(\sin x > 0\), which for \(0^\circ < x < 180^\circ\) means \(0^\circ < x < 180^\circ\) except at the endpoints, so \(\sin x \in (0, 1]\).  
Then \(\sqrt{\sin x} \in (0, 1]\), and \(\log_2(\sqrt{\sin x}) \in (-\infty, 0]\).  
Thus the range is \((-\infty, 0]\).

\boxed{(-\infty, 0]}
